# OWASP ZAP Rules Configuration for Meqenet FinTech Platform
# This file configures security scanning rules specific to Ethiopian BNPL platform

# Ignore false positives for legitimate financial endpoints
# 10021: X-Content-Type-Options header missing (handled by framework)
10021	IGNORE	# Content-Type options handled by NestJS security headers

# Ignore cookie security warnings for development endpoints
10010	IGNORE	# Cookie security handled by secure cookie configuration

# High-priority security tests for FinTech
# Enable all injection attack tests
40018	# SQL Injection tests
40019	# XSS reflection tests  
40020	# XSS stored tests
40021	# Anti-CSRF token tests

# Financial data protection tests
40023	# HTTPS enforcement
40024	# Secure headers validation
40025	# Authentication bypass tests

# NBE compliance specific tests
40026	# Data encryption validation
40027	# Audit logging verification
40028	# Ethiopian regulatory compliance

# Payment security tests
40029	# Payment card data protection
40030	# Transaction integrity tests
40031	# Merchant payment security

# KYC and identity verification security
40032	# Fayda National ID protection
40033	# Biometric data security
40034	# Identity verification bypass tests

# API security for microservices
40035	# JWT token validation
40036	# API rate limiting tests
40037	# Service-to-service authentication

# Enable all OWASP Top 10 tests
# A01:2021 - Broken Access Control
90001	# Access control tests
90002	# Authorization bypass tests

# A02:2021 - Cryptographic Failures  
90003	# Encryption validation
90004	# Key management tests

# A03:2021 - Injection
90005	# SQL injection comprehensive
90006	# NoSQL injection tests
90007	# Command injection tests

# A04:2021 - Insecure Design
90008	# Business logic flaws
90009	# Design pattern security

# A05:2021 - Security Misconfiguration
90010	# Configuration security
90011	# Default credentials

# A06:2021 - Vulnerable and Outdated Components
90012	# Dependency vulnerability tests
90013	# Library security validation

# A07:2021 - Identification and Authentication Failures
90014	# Authentication bypass
90015	# Session management flaws

# A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
90016	# Code integrity tests
90017	# Supply chain security

# A09:2021 - Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
90018	# Logging security tests
90019	# Monitoring bypass tests

# A10:2021 - Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
90020	# SSRF attack tests
90021	# Internal service exposure
